title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 20 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 20 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 20 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 20/03/2025
This morning, the iron ore futures continued to hit new lows, with a slight rebound in the afternoon. The most-traded I2505 contract closed at 762,down 0.46% for the day. Traders sold according to market conditions; steel mills were cautious and observed, with moderate purchase willingness; the overall trading atmosphere was average.
